scripts-descriptions.test:orange: Run the Orange Framework core unit tests (unittest/runUnitTests.sh).
scripts-descriptions.test:orangeCoverage: Run the Orange Framework core unit tests with code coverage (unittest/runCoverage.sh).
scripts-descriptions.test:orangeMutation: Run mutation testing against src/ with Infection, using unittest/phpunit.xml.dist.
scripts-descriptions.type-check: Run PHPStan static type analysis on the framework src/ using the root project's vendor/bin/phpstan.
scripts-descriptions.lint: Check src/ against the PSR-12 coding standard using the root project's vendor/bin/phpcs.
scripts-descriptions.lint:fix: Auto-fix PSR-12 coding standard violations in src/ using the root project's vendor/bin/phpcbf.
scripts-descriptions.lint:phpmd: Check src/ for code smells, complexity and unused code with PHP Mess Detector.
scripts-descriptions.analyze:deptrac: Check src/ for architectural layer violations with Deptrac (see deptrac.yaml).
scripts-descriptions.analyze:rector: Preview automated refactoring/modernization suggestions with Rector (dry-run, does not modify files).
scripts-descriptions.findViews: Find view files under a controllers directory relative to project root, e.g. `composer findViews application`.
scripts-descriptions.findRoutes: Scan for routes under a given directory, e.g. `composer findRoutes application`.
